title: Talk about the video
prompt: Use one or two sentences to respond to this scene: Hey Veronica, I know you're on your lunch break, so it's just a quick question.
sample: Hey Veronica, I know you're on your lunch break, so it's just a quick question.

ja.prompt: 字幕の語を使って一、二文で答えてください。
ja.hint: 字幕の言葉を再利用してください。
ja.sample: Hey Veronica, I know you're on your lunch break, so it's just a quick question.

zh.prompt: 請用一到兩句回應這個情境。
zh.sample: Hey Veronica, I know you're on your lunch break, so it's just a quick question.
